dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world changed ten years ago. Towers, gates to other dimensions, appeared, filled with monsters and untold treasures.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And with them, 'Players' awakened. Individuals blessed with unique skills and the ability to level up, growing stronger with each monster slain.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They climbed the towers, protecting humanity, becoming heroes... and gods.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: Ten years. Ten years since the first tower appeared. Ten years since I awakened.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: And ten years of being stuck at level 1.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROWL

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: Damn it! Another Grolak Goblin.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! (rusty sword scraping against thick hide)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: My rusty sword barely scratches its hide. This is all I can do. Swing, parry, dodge.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: No flashy skills, no powerful attacks. Just the same old grind in this F-rank dungeon.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK! (Gi-Gyu kicks the goblin, it stumbles)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: My 'skill'... [Absorption]. It lets me absorb the properties of anything I touch.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: But what good is absorbing the 'hardness' of a rock when I can't even swing a sword properly? Or the 'sharpness' of a dull blade?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: I've tried everything. Absorbing monster parts, dungeon walls, even other players' equipment (they didn't like that).

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: It just... changes my body slightly. Never enough to make a difference. Never enough to level up.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK! (Gi-Gyu finally lands a solid hit, goblin falls)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: One down. Only a hundred more to go before I can even think about buying a decent meal.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DING!

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: Status window... don't even bother.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: [Kim Gi-Gyu, Lv. 1]... Always Lv. 1. No experience gained. No skill points. Nothing.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS (distant, confident)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: Sounds like a party. Better hide. Don't want to get in their way.

dialogue.speaker: Player A
dialogue.line: Hey, isn't that the 'Eternal Novice'?

dialogue.speaker: Player B
dialogue.line: Oh, him? Still trying to clear the F-rank dungeon? Pathetic.

dialogue.speaker: Player A
dialogue.line: He's been at it for years. What a waste of an awakening.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (as they pass, uncaring)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: Pathetic, huh? Maybe. But what else am I supposed to do?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: I can't level up. My 'skill' is useless. Everyone says so. But... I have to try. There has to be a way.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: If I can't level up, then I'll find another path. Even if it means going to places no Level 1 should ever go.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE (a distant, deeper tremor)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: The whispers... of a new gate opening. A C-rank. Far too dangerous for me.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: But... what if? What if my 'Absorption' skill isn't useless? What if it's just... misunderstood?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: I've been stuck in the shallow end for too long. It's time to dive into the deep.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP (Gi-Gyu's fist hitting his palm, resolute)

dialogue.speaker: Kim Gi-Gyu
dialogue.line: Fine. Let's see what a Level 1 can do in a C-rank dungeon.

summary: Kim Gi-Gyu, a 'Player' stuck at Level 1 for ten years, struggles in a low-rank dungeon, constantly mocked by others for his useless 'Absorption' skill. Frustrated but determined, he decides to challenge a dangerous C-rank dungeon, hoping to find an unconventional path to power.
